generativeProfile.operatesOn: a stretch of activity in which the system needs structured information from the actor that can't be inferred from prior context
generativeProfile.produces: a guided collection surface where fields are committed one at a time and the whole set can be reviewed before submission
generativeProfile.enacts: clarity about what's being asked, agency over what's submitted, room for revision before commit

generativeProfile.operatesOn: a system event whose existence the actor needs to know about, alongside an existing flow that has its own demands on attention
generativeProfile.produces: a delivery surface tuned to the event's urgency and the actor's availability
generativeProfile.enacts: awareness without disruption — or with disruption when warranted — and respect for the actor's current attention

generativeProfile.operatesOn: a heterogeneous collection of subjects that need to be browsed at a glance and compared against each other
generativeProfile.produces: a uniformly bounded representation per subject — a same-shaped frame across the collection — that lets attributes, media, and actions read in one pass
generativeProfile.enacts: scannability of the collection, density-comparability across items, legibility of each subject as one thing

generativeProfile.operatesOn: an evolving exchange between actors where meaning has to be built up over multiple turns rather than stated in one
generativeProfile.produces: a dialogue structure that carries context forward, lets either party take a turn, and accommodates repair when alignment slips
generativeProfile.enacts: shared understanding, mutual agency, room for the unfolding nature of meaning

generativeProfile.operatesOn: an actor's first encounter with a system (or a changed part of one) before they have a working mental model of what's possible and what will happen
generativeProfile.produces: a bounded period in which the actor can build that model with low stakes, often by doing rather than reading
generativeProfile.enacts: learnability of the system's affordances, safety to try things, value visible early enough to motivate continued use

generativeProfile.operatesOn: a free-form input where the set of valid answers is large or the actor is still formulating the query
generativeProfile.produces: a narrowing surface of candidate completions running alongside what's been typed
generativeProfile.enacts: assistance without taking over, discoverability of options that exist, economy of typing

generativeProfile.operatesOn: a single binary preference the actor wants to commit without leaving the surrounding flow
generativeProfile.produces: a visible on/off state the actor can flip in place
generativeProfile.enacts: legibility of state, continuity with the surrounding flow

generativeProfile.operatesOn: a piece of information the system cannot enumerate or infer — it has to be supplied
generativeProfile.produces: a free-form text slot the actor can write into
generativeProfile.enacts: openness to anything sayable; trust in what the actor types

generativeProfile.operatesOn: content that divides into a small, stable set of named parts where which-mode-to-show is a property of context, not of the content
generativeProfile.produces: a single container whose disclosure affordance (tabs vs. accordion) shifts with context without restructuring the content
generativeProfile.enacts: adaptability to context, continuity of structure across affordances

generativeProfile.operatesOn: a single field whose value must come from a short, bounded set the actor already recognises
generativeProfile.produces: a collapsed control that hides the option set out of the way until the actor needs to act on it
generativeProfile.enacts: economy of attention and screen space; recognition over recall

generativeProfile.operatesOn: a recent action whose outcome the actor would benefit from confirming, without needing acknowledgement before continuing
generativeProfile.produces: a brief peripheral message that auto-dismisses after a short window, optionally carrying a single trailing affordance such as undo
generativeProfile.enacts: acknowledgement of the action's completion, lightness of touch, recoverability within the dismissal window

generativeProfile.operatesOn: a recently committed action whose consequences the actor wants to retract
generativeProfile.produces: a reverse path that returns the structure to its prior state, with a window in which the retraction is offered
generativeProfile.enacts: forgiveness for mistakes, room for confident exploration

Dynamic hyperlinks are prose-as-affordance: the link text is the prose, and the move from authored phrase to actionable target is itself the prose move.
Reference links rest on a prose convention — that an authored phrase points to a canonical entity. The prose decides what counts as a name worth linking.
Deep linking surfaces a piece of system state as a shareable address; the prose around the link does the work of telling the recipient what they will land in.
IA owns the labelling vocabulary; prose owns how those labels get phrased and where they tolerate ambiguity.
Intent & Interaction frames interaction as a sequence of turns; prose is what those turns are made of when they are text.
Collaboration depends on shared interpretive ground; prose is the most flexible carrier of that ground between participants.
Assistance lives largely as microcopy; each helper line is a small assistive turn made of prose.
Delegation surfaces are increasingly written rather than chosen; the prose decides what the agent sounds like and what authority it claims.
